reviews.comment:
No tiene shop ni lugar para cargar agua caliente. De casualidad tiene baño

(Translated by Google)
There's no shop or place to fill up with hot water. It even has a bathroom, by sheer luck.

reviews.comment:
La única estación de servicio del pueblo

(Translated by Google)
The only gas station in town
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5dGQ2TGh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Se supone q una estación de servicio tienen q atender los dos turnos ,pero en esta estación no solo te atienden hasta las 22:00 y luego cierran todo y apagan las luces, nisiquiera dejan los baños a disposición muy mal ya q muchos viajeros pasan x el lugar a querer descansar

(Translated by Google)
A gas station is supposed to be open for both shifts, but at this station they only serve you until 10:00 PM and then they close everything and turn off the lights. They don't even leave the restrooms available. It's very bad, since many travelers pass through the place wanting to rest.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkNDRXYUl3EAE

reviews.comment:
No me gustó cierran a las 22 tiene duchas pero no te las dejan usar no hay mucha onda en el lugar

(Translated by Google)
I didn't like it. They close at 10 p.m. They have showers but they don't let you use them. There isn't much of a vibe in the place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkOWRuZnFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Ir con tiempo a la estación de servicio, es la única en toda la zona y solo tiene 2 surtidores para Nafta y 2 para Diesel, suele haber colas y no funciona 24 horas

(Translated by Google)
Arrive at the gas station with plenty of time; it's the only one in the entire area and only has two pumps for gasoline and two for diesel. There are usually queues, and it's not open 24 hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkeHZDdEl3EAE
